title: astragalus hintonii
intro: Astragalus hintonii, also known as Mexican milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Astragalus hintonii include improved cardiovascular function, enhanced immune response, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Astragalus hintonii include dried roots, capsules, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
